publishedAbstract: # WARNING: **This process is a Developer's Preview feature for all clusters deployed using ODF v4.18 and below. This will require a Support Exception if this configuration is needed in a production environment.** This article provides guidance for cluster optimization in case the workload consumes mainly Block, File storage, or Object. Please note that the Object configuration is relevant only for bare metal or vSphere hosting environments.
publishedTitle: Storage optimization using Ceph Autoscaler and a Target Size Ratio for PG Increase/Placement on Large Pools - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) v4.19+
